visuals.title: NLP Processing Pipeline
visuals.description: Visual diagram for what is nlp
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350" viewBox="0 0 420 350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur in="SourceAlpha" stdDeviation="3"/>
      <feOffset dx="2" dy="2" result="offsetblur"/>
      <feFlood flood-color="#000000" flood-opacity="0.2"/>
      <feComposite in2="offsetblur" operator="in"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">What is Natural Language Processing</text>
  
  <!-- Input: Human Language -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" filter="url(#shadow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Human Language
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow 1 -->
  <polyline points="180,80 200,80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polyline>
  <polygon points="200,80 195,77 195,83" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- NLP Processing -->
  <rect x="200" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" filter="url(#shadow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    NLP Processing
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow 2 -->
  <polyline points="320,80 340,80" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polyline>
  <polygon points="340,80 335,77 335,83" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Output: Machine Understanding -->
  <rect x="340" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" filter="url(#shadow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="400" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Machine Understanding
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- NLP Applications -->
  <rect x="60" y="130" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" filter="url(#shadow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Text Analysis
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="200" y="130" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" filter="url(#shadow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Sentiment Analysis
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="340" y="130" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" filter="url(#shadow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="400" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Machine Translation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- NLP Techniques -->
  <rect x="60" y="200" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" filter="url(#shadow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Tokenization
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="200" y="200" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" filter="url(#shadow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    POS Tagging
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="340" y="200" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" filter="url(#shadow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="400" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    NER
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Central Concept -->
  <circle cx="210" y="280" r="40" fill="#1565C0" filter="url(#shadow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="5.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="285" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    AI + Linguistics
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
